title: arctostaphylos uva-ursi subsp. coactilis
intro: Arctostaphylos uva-ursi subsp. coactilis, also known as bearberry, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to the western United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and astringent properties, which make it useful in treating urinary tract infections and other conditions. The health benefits of bearberry include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off bacterial and fungal infections, and support immune function. Bearberry is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
